title: such + (a/an +) adj. + N + that + 子句

formulas.formula: such + (a/an) + adj. + N + that + S + V
formulas.zh: 表「如此……的……以致於……」，such 後接名詞片語，强調名詞的特徵導致某個結果

formulas.formula: such + adj. + (複數/不可數) N + that + S + V
formulas.zh: 複數或不可數名詞前直接接 such，無需冠詞

explanation: 此句型用 such 搭配形容詞修飾名詞，強調名詞的性質或特徵，後接 that 引導的結果子句。可數單數名詞前需加 a/an，複數名詞或不可數名詞直接接；此句型與 so...that 可互換，但 so 後接形容詞，such 後接名詞片語，是關鍵區別。常用於表達強烈結果或後果，在學測中頻繁出現。注意：such 前後的邏輯關係應清晰一致。

examples.eng: It was such a difficult problem that no one could solve it.
examples.chi: 這是一個如此困難的問題，以至於沒有人能解決它。

examples.eng: She gave such useful advice that everyone benefited greatly.
examples.chi: 她提供了如此有用的建議，以致於每個人都大受裨益。

examples.eng: They were such talented musicians that they won the international competition.
examples.chi: 他們是如此有才華的音樂家，以至於贏得了國際比賽。

examples.eng: The weather was such terrible conditions that the flight was cancelled.
examples.chi: 天氣狀況如此惡劣，以至於班機被取消了。

extension.tip: 判斷何時用 such vs so：such 後直接接名詞片語（包括形容詞修飾），so 後接形容詞或副詞；記住「such a/an adj. N」的模式，單數可數名詞必須加冠詞；複數或不可數名詞前的 such 後無冠詞，直接接名詞。

examples.test: Such a bright student could not make such a mistake.
examples.result: → 正確。「bright student」是可數單數，前加 a；「mistake」是可數單數，前加 a

examples.test: She had such knowledge that everyone admired her.
examples.result: → 正確。knowledge 是不可數名詞，such 後直接接，無冠詞

examples.test: Such energetic children needed such space to play.
examples.result: → 正確。children（複數）前直接接 such；space（不可數概念）前直接接 such

extension.note: 「such + (a/an) + adj. + N」→ 可數單數加冠詞；「such + adj. + (複數/不可數 N)」→ 無冠詞

parts: composition that the teacher praised it highly.
exercises.sentence: The student wrote such a well-organized composition that the teacher praised it highly.
exercises.translation: 這位學生寫了如此組織完善的作文，以至於老師大力讚揚了它。

parts: that all the plans had to be changed.
exercises.sentence: They faced such unforeseen circumstances that all the plans had to be changed.
exercises.translation: 他們面臨了如此難以預料的情況，以至於所有計畫都必須改變。

parts: that the audience gave a standing ovation.
exercises.sentence: The performance was such an outstanding display that the audience gave a standing ovation.
exercises.translation: 表演是如此出色的展示，以至於觀眾起立鼓掌。

parts: from customers that production could not keep up.
exercises.sentence: The company received such overwhelming demand from customers that production could not keep up.
exercises.translation: 公司收到了如此壓倒性的客戶需求，以至於生產跟不上。
